mcq:
I _____ TV when you called.
a) watch b) watched c) was watching d) am watching

They _____ football at 5 pm yesterday.
a) play b) played c) were playing d) are playing
tf: We use past continuous for actions happening at a specific time in the past. [True/False]
I was sleep when you came. [True/False]
short: Make a sentence: While I was cooking, my brother _____

mcq:
A vehicle that goes underwater is a:
a) Ship b) Submarine c) Boat d) Ferry

We buy a _____ before traveling by plane.
a) Ticket b) Passport c) Luggage d) Visa
short: How do you prefer to travel and why?
long: Write about a trip you would like to take

mcq:
She _____ English for 5 years.
a) learns b) learned c) has learned d) has been learning

They _____ here since 2020.
a) live b) lived c) have lived d) have been living
tf: We use present perfect continuous for actions that started in the past and continue now. [True/False]
I have been work here for 2 years. [True/False]
short: Write a sentence using 'have been playing'
Change to present perfect continuous: I study English

mcq:
Cutting down too many trees causes:
a) Afforestation b) Deforestation c) Reforestation d) Pollution

Global warming leads to:
a) Colder weather b) Melting ice c) More rain d) Less sea level
tf: Burning plastic is good for the environment. [True/False]
short: What can we do to protect the environment?

mcq:
The house _____ every day.
a) clean b) cleans c) is cleaned d) was cleaned

The letter _____ yesterday.
a) write b) wrote c) is written d) was written
tf: In passive voice, the object becomes the subject. [True/False]
We use 'have' + past participle in passive present perfect. [True/False]
short: Change to passive: People speak English worldwide
Write a sentence in passive past simple

mcq:
He said, 'I am tired'. → He said that he _____ tired.
a) am b) was c) is d) were

'I will go', she said. → She said that she _____ go.
a) will b) would c) can d) may
tf: In reported speech, we change the tense one step back. [True/False]
short: Change to reported speech: 'I can swim', he said

mcq:
Who invented the telephone?
a) Edison b) Bell c) Newton d) Einstein

The internet helps us _____ information quickly.
a) lose b) hide c) access d) forget
tf: The first computer was smaller than a phone. [True/False]
long: Write about an invention that changed the world

mcq:
This time tomorrow, I _____ to school.
a) go b) will go c) will be going d) went

By next year, she _____ her degree.
a) finish b) will finish c) will have finished d) finished
tf: Future continuous is used for actions happening at a specific time in the future. [True/False]
Future perfect shows an action completed before another future action. [True/False]
short: Make a sentence using future continuous
Write a sentence using 'will have lived'
